description: Style NoteLook funky and fashionable in these capris from jealous 21. Perfect to wear on a fun day out with friends, pop it on with your favourite colourful tee and heeled sandals.Product DetailsBlue denim capris, below knee length, has fading on thighs and back, a zip and button closure, belt loops on waistband, two front pockets with one change pocket, two patch pockets on back, a silver brand patch on back waistband, has a vented hem with stitch detailingMaterial and Care72% cotton, 26.5% polyester and 1.5% spandexMachine or hand wash separately with mild detergentDo not bleach or wringDry in shadeMedium ironSize and FitRegular FitThe model (height 5'8" and waist 28") is wearing a size 28
